headline: NDSN Q2 Deep Dive: Order Momentum Drives Guidance Lift, Strategic M&A Expands Precision Ag Portfolio
summary: Manufacturing company Nordson (NASDAQ:NDSN) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 8.5% year on year to $740.8 million. Guidance for next quarter’s revenue was better than expected at $775 million at the midpoint, 1% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.86 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.
